text:
#[derive(Clone, Debug, Default, Eq, PartialEq)]
pub struct ColorSpecs {
    path: ColorSpec,
    line: ColorSpec,
    column: ColorSpec,
    matched: ColorSpec,
    highlight: ColorSpec,
}

#[derive(Copy, Clone, Debug)]
pub enum LineChange {
    Added,
    RemovedAbove,
    RemovedBelow,
    Modified,
}
